CONTENT.Professional career: On 12 December 2020, Caio Vidal signed his first professional contract with Internacional. Caio made his professional debut with Internacional in a 1-0 Copa do Brasil win over América Mineiro on 19 November 2020.On 24 May 2023, Caio scored two goals in the final of the Bulgarian Cup against CSKA 1948.

SUMMARY: Caio Vidal Rocha (born 4 November 2000), known as Caio Vidal, is a Brazilian professional footballer who plays as a winger for Ludogorets Razgrad.
